stemHtml: What is the purpose of the aircraft performance database? It provides the FMC with information…

options.a: That would normally be determined by referring to charts, by including the location of navigation aids, aerodromes, and instrument procedures.
options.b: That would normally be determined by referring to the AFM, by including performance penalties for fight control failures.
options.c: Required to calculate take-off and landing performance, by including aerodrome and runway-specific obstacles.
options.d: Required to calculate pitch and thrust commands, by including aircraft drag and engine characteristics.
